item.name: Yellow Iris
item.description:
Like its namesake flower, this fish has put many local ecosystems at risk.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The delicate yellow scales of this fish belie its invasive nature, and many an ecosystem has been disrupted by the yellow iris's arrival on currents from afar. Sailors know to batten down the hatches upon sighting a school of them, for they invariably carry rough seas in their wake.
